Aries: Energetic, impulsive, natural leaders, pioneer spirit, can be impatient.
Taurus: Patient, reliable, stubborn, lovers of luxury and stability.
Cancer: Nurturing, emotional, highly intuitive, protective of home.
Leo: Charismatic, confident, generous, loves the spotlight, can be dramatic.
Virgo: Analytical, practical, detail-oriented, helpful, sometimes overly critical.
Libra: Diplomatic, fair-minded, aesthetic, values harmony and partnership.
Pisces: Empathetic, artistic, mystical, compassionate, easily overwhelmed.
